/home/aj/tools/lapis/kokkosInstall/bin/kokkos_launch_compiler /home/aj/tools/lapis/kokkosInstall/bin/nvcc_wrapper /home/aj/miniforge3/envs/lapis/bin/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ /home/aj/miniforge3/envs/lapis/bin/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu-c++ -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fmessage-length=0 -march=nocona -mtune=haswell -ftree-vectorize -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -fno-plt -O2 -ffunction-sections -pipe -isystem /home/aj/miniforge3/envs/lapis/include  -I/home/aj/miniforge3/envs/lapis/targets/x86_64-linux/include -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/aj/miniforge3/envs/lapis/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/aj/miniforge3/envs/lapis/lib -L/home/aj/miniforge3/envs/lapis/lib  -L/home/aj/miniforge3/envs/lapis/targets/x86_64-linux/lib -L/home/aj/miniforge3/envs/lapis/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs -DKOKKOS_DEPENDENCE -arch=sm_86 CMakeFiles/resnet.dir/main.cpp.o -o resnet  /home/aj/tools/lapis/kokkosBuild/containers/src/libkokkoscontainers.a /home/aj/tools/lapis/kokkosBuild/core/src/libkokkoscore.a /home/aj/miniforge3/envs/lapis/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs/libcuda.so /home/aj/miniforge3/envs/lapis/lib/libcudart.so -lpthread /home/aj/miniforge3/envs/lapis/x86_64-conda-linux-gnu/sysroot/usr/lib/librt.so -ldl /home/aj/tools/lapis/kokkosBuild/simd/src/libkokkossimd.a
